mapper.sql: id, username, phone, password, nickname, avatar, status, last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
select
from user_account where username = #{username} limit 1

select
from user_account where phone = #{phone} limit 1

select
from user_account where (username = #{account} or phone = #{account}) and password = #{password} and status = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_account (username, phone, password, nickname, avatar, status) values (#{username}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{status})
